project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Resolve an effective owner scope for host-root CLI recovery, add owner switching, Root recovery profile, and prevent user:unknown sessions.

userStories.title: Add owner discovery and Root recovery owner
userStories.description: As a host-root CLI operator, I want the CLI to discover Web users or fall back to Root recovery so sessions always have a real owner scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement owner discovery from rooms, sessions, session_navigation, custom agents, and Better Auth data where available
Define a stable Root recovery owner scope that is not user:unknown and has no email requirement
Ensure the selected or fallback owner has a Personal Chat/default room available
Focused tests cover no owners, one owner, and multiple owners
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 13c0b33. Implemented LocalCliSessionSource owner discovery and active owner resolution from explicit --owner-scope, session store, Pibo data rooms/session_navigation/sessions/event_log actor owner scopes, and custom-agent owner hints passed by the default CLI source context. Added stable Root recovery owner local:root with label Root recovery and no email requirement. listRooms/getStatus/createSession now ensure or expose a selected-owner Personal Chat/default room; createSession without owner no longer silently writes user:unknown and uses the resolved owner/default room. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs' passed 25/25 focused tests (real source/unit path, no PTY required for this source-contract story). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run; it failed in unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune test that also fails standalone, while this story's focused tests passed.

userStories.title: Implement owner picker and active owner state
userStories.description: As a recovery operator, I want to choose the effective user/profile before rooms and sessions are shown.
acceptanceCriteria: Startup uses --owner-scope when provided and otherwise resolves or prompts for an owner before room navigation
Multiple owners show an Ink owner picker with keyboard navigation
Header and /status include active owner label and scope
pibo debug pty scenario asserts owner picker appears with multiple owners
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 19aea5d. Implemented startup active-owner state for the Ink CLI with a keyboard owner picker when multiple owners are discovered, explicit --owner-scope skip behavior, mutable CliSessionSource.setActiveOwner(), and header/status propagation through the selected owner label/scope. The fake and local sources now support switching the effective owner; selection closes any open handle before room navigation. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 28/28 focused tests (real source/unit path plus Ink render/reducer tests). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-owner-room && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-owner-room --timeout-ms 45000 --idle-timeout-ms 12000 --cols 100 --rows 28 --wait-for "Select effective owner" --expect "Web user alpha" --expect "Web user beta" --press Down --press Enter --wait-for "Select room for Web user beta" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha,user:beta node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions' passed (real PTY path with deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider); scripted assertions waited for the owner picker, asserted Web user alpha and Web user beta, selected beta with Down/Enter, then continued to room/session creation. Raw PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/raw.ansi.log. Clean PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/clean.txt. Observed clean output shows "Select effective owner", selected "Web user beta (user:beta)" in the header, and continued without user:unknown. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run; 489/490 tests passed and the only failure remained the pre-existing unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion.

userStories.title: Add /owner or /profile switch flow
userStories.description: As a CLI operator, I want to switch the effective owner during a recovery session so I can inspect another user's rooms and sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add /owner or /profile command to open the owner picker
Switching owners closes or clears the active session unless it belongs to the new owner
Rooms, sessions, agents, and slash actions reload for the selected owner
Sending to a session owned by another owner is rejected with a clear error
pibo debug pty scenario switches owner and asserts room list changes
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 21dc2e6c35252141d37182d3aa59fa62678dfb7a. Implemented /owner and /profile commands that open the effective-owner picker during a CLI session. Selecting a different owner uses the existing owner picker path to close the open session, clear transcript/session state, and reload rooms for the selected owner; the header and status then show the new active owner. Added source-side owner mismatch protection in the fake CLI source to mirror local-source owner validation so sends/profile changes against a session owned by another active owner fail clearly instead of crossing owner scopes. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 30/30 focused tests (real build plus focused unit/source/Ink paths). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-owner-switch && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-owner-switch --timeout-ms 60000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 110 --rows 30 --wait-for "Select effective owner" --expect "Web user alpha" --expect "Web user beta" --press Enter --wait-for "Select room for Web user alpha" --expect "Alpha Room" --press Down --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Alpha Room" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/owner" --press Enter --wait-for "Select effective owner" --press Down --press Enter --wait-for "Select room for Web user beta" --expect "Beta Room" --expect "Pibo CLI Sessions | local/direct | Web user beta (user:beta)" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha,user:beta PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_ROOMS="user:alpha|room_alpha|Alpha Room;user:beta|room_beta|Beta Room" node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions' passed (real PTY path with deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider); scripted assertions selected alpha, created a session in Alpha Room, ran /owner, switched to beta, and observed Beta Room plus the beta owner header. Raw PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-switch/raw.ansi.log. Clean PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-switch/clean.txt. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed.

userStories.title: Prevent and repair user:unknown CLI sessions
userStories.description: As an admin, I want diagnostics and repair for legacy user:unknown sessions so they can be reassigned safely and no new ones are created accidentally.
acceptanceCriteria: New CLI session creation, user message ingest, assistant event ingest, and navigation writes never silently use user:unknown
Legacy user:unknown sessions are excluded from default new-write flows unless explicitly selected or repaired
Provide a CLI diagnostic or repair path to reassign legacy CLI sessions to a selected owner
Tests cover sessions.owner_scope and session_navigation.owner_scope updates
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 1b442ef. Implemented LocalCliSessionSource.repairLegacyUserUnknownSessions() and the Ink /repair-user-unknown diagnostic/repair command. The repair path refuses target owner user:unknown, scans legacy CLI sessions currently stored as user:unknown, reassigns only CLI-origin sessions (channel cli-session-ui or metadata source pibo tui:sessions) to the selected owner, maps them to the selected/default room, updates sessions.owner_scope/sessions.room_id through the Pibo data session/read model, and upserts session_navigation with the selected owner/room/status. Existing default owner discovery still excludes user:unknown unless explicitly selected, and new create/send paths continue using the selected owner. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed after a test-only regex fix; rerun docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 36/36 focused tests. Focused tests cover sessions.owner_scope/session_navigation.owner_scope repair, skipped non-CLI user:unknown rows, invalid repair target rejection, and the Ink command invoking source repair for the active owner/room. Path classification: real local source/unit integration against temp PiboDataStore plus Ink command reducer path; no PTY was required by this repair story because no startup/send TUI path changed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 498 tests; 497 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Verify selected Web owner sessions appear in Web UI
userStories.description: As a Web user, I want sessions created through host-root CLI impersonation to appear in my Web Personal Chat or selected room.
acceptanceCriteria: pibo debug pty creates a session as a selected Web owner in Personal Chat and sends a message through the real router/source path
Store/API/Web navigation check confirms the created session is visible for that owner and room
The session URL /rooms/<roomId>/sessions/<sessionId> opens or is returned for manual verification
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in f4c2aa6. Verified that a host-root CLI run using explicit selected Web owner user:pty creates Web-visible sessions in that owner’s Personal Chat/default room and sends a message through the local CLI source/read-model path. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-new-web .tmp/pty-new-web-home && mkdir -p .tmp/pty-new-web-home && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-new-web --timeout-ms 60000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 120 --rows 32 --wait-for "Select room for Web user pty" --expect "Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/new" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "Persist from PTY" --press Enter --wait-for "PTY assistant persisted" --expect "Message sent" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.tmp/pty-new-web-home PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_ASSISTANT_REPLY="PTY assistant persisted" node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions --owner-scope user:pty' passed (real PTY path with LocalCliSessionSource plus deterministic mocked local router to avoid live provider credentials; no FakeCliSessionSource/demo path). Scripted assertions selected Personal Chat for Web user pty, created a session, ran /new in the active room, sent Persist from PTY, waited for the assistant reply PTY assistant persisted, and expected Message sent. PTY artifacts: raw /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-new-web/raw.ansi.log; clean /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-new-web/clean.txt. Store/API read-model check queried /workspace/.tmp/pty-new-web-home/pibo.sqlite after the PTY run and confirmed latest session ps_e55f4202-e8d9-4de4-9830-b17598c1d881 has sessions.owner_scope=user:pty, sessions.room_id=room_6b3d9f0e-5d58-4cc0-bfaa-ff3ee2665107, session_navigation owner/room/status idle with last_message_preview=PTY assistant persisted, chat_messages rows for user Persist from PTY and assistant PTY assistant persisted in the same room, and event_log rows for user.message.accepted and assistant_message in the same room. Web URL for manual verification: http://127.0.0.1:4822/apps/chat/rooms/room_6b3d9f0e-5d58-4cc0-bfaa-ff3ee2665107/sessions/ps_e55f4202-e8d9-4de4-9830-b17598c1d881. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 32/32 focused tests. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 494 tests; 493 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.
